name: Medium Gliding Tray with Bin Clear - Brightroom™
description:
Keep your bathroom cabinet organized with this Medium Gliding Tray with Shelf from Brightroom™. Made of recycled PET and post-consumer recycled plastic, this cabinet organizer features a clear shelf on the top and a base gliding tray to store your everyday essentials. Featuring raised edges, this tray with a shelf glides smoothly to easily access hard-to-reach items. Designed for indoor use, it fits most standard cabinets.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
